text_excerpt: Latest news - Munira.org.uk --> --> Home Help & Advice News Media Campaigns Get in touch Latest news Munira regularly releases news updates on this section of the website. If you would like to be sent the latest news by email, click here . To browse the news archive including older articles, view all news . Latest news Twickenham loses police counter – Munira says “show us the officers” Munira called for a “clear and noticeable” increase in police on the streets. Read more Munira responds to Government’s bathing water status announcement Welcomes news that Ham and Kingston is one of 13 proposed spots, but calls for Thames Water’s sewage recycling proposals to be scrapped, saying the two proposals are “fundamentally incompatible”. Read more Munira brands Government’s PFAS action plan “underwhelming” Says the UK needs urgent action, not more “dithering and delay”. Read more Munira presses the Government on deportation of Roksana Lecka Munira has been urgently seeking answers from Ministers, so that the parents and children can be reassured Lecka will not walk free in Poland. Read more Munira calls on the Met to sell Teddington Police Station for community benefit Munira speaks to the BBC outside Teddington Police Station. Read more Munira slams Government’s decision to back Heathrow’s third runway proposals Munira says the choice should not have come down to two rival bids – the choice should be for no third runway at all. Read more Munira pledges to fight to make nurseries safe for every child Munira pledged to push the Government to improve safeguarding for children in nurseries, following the horrific case of abuse at Twickenham Green Montessori, part of the Riverside Nursery group. Read more Munira challenges Twickenham police station front counter closures Munira continues to press the Government, the Metropolitan Police and the Mayor of London on these plans, including raising the issue in Parliament and in the media. Read more Munira speaks in debate on boys’ attainment and engagement in education Too many boys aren’t able to reach their potential at school, which has severe consequences for our society. Read more Munira responds to Heathrow third runway proposals With Heathrow Airport formally submitting its proposals for a third runway on 1 August 2025, Munira issued a statement opposing the plans. Read more Join 100s of local residents Subscribe now to join Munira’s mailing list. You can choose to receive info about events, campaigns, or news, and you can unsubscribe at any time. Sign up Privacy Munira Wilson MP is the Member of Parliament for Twickenham.
